message:
feat(ui): add satisfying micro-interactions to copy and basket buttons

Implements visual polish for PromptCard, PromptDetailModal, and BasketSidebar:

- Copy button: Spring animation on icon swap (rotate + scale), background flash,
  haptic feedback for mobile
- Basket button: Same animations for consistency with copy button
- Basket items: AnimatePresence with slide in/out animations, layout animations
  for smooth reordering
- All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion for accessibility

Addresses success criteria from Visual Polish epic:
- Copy success has satisfying visual feedback
- Basket items animate on add/remove
- All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
